news.title: Top tax frustrations for Americans: Feeling that some wealthy people, corporations don’t pay fair share
news.summary_en: 61% of adults say that the feeling that some wealthy people don’t pay their fair share bothers them a lot. 60% say this about some some corporations.

news.title: Americans’ Shifting Views on Energy Issues
news.summary_en: The share of Republicans who say the country should prioritize oil, coal and natural gas over wind and solar power has doubled to 71% over the last six years.
